assertions.assertion: Implements IExtensionGrantValidator with the GrantType set to 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange'
assertions.rationale: The grant type URI is from the RFC and IExtensionGrantValidator is the known Duende interface

assertions.assertion: Extracts and validates the subject_token from the request
assertions.rationale: Token exchange RFC defines subject_token parameter, an LLM would likely include this

assertions.assertion: Returns a GrantValidationResult with a subject ID and custom claims array
assertions.rationale: The exact GrantValidationResult constructor signature with custom claims array is Duende-specific and unlikely to be recalled precisely

assertions.assertion: Registers the validator with AddExtensionGrantValidator<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: The exact registration method name might not be precisely recalled without documentation

assertions.assertion: Mentions that IProfileService is called after the grant validator and can augment claims further
assertions.rationale: The pipeline detail that IProfileService runs after grant validation is Duende-specific knowledge
